properties.name: application.security.jwt.secret-key
properties.description: Base64-encoded signing key used to create and verify JWT tokens.

properties.name: application.security.oauth.google-client-id
properties.description: Google OAuth web client ID exposed to the frontend and enforced when validating Google ID tokens.

properties.name: application.security.oauth.google-hosted-domain
properties.description: Optional Google Workspace hosted domain that is allowed to sign in.

properties.name: file.upload-dir
properties.description: Directory where uploaded ticket files are stored.

properties.name: file.max-attachments-per-ticket
properties.description: Maximum number of attachments allowed per ticket.

properties.name: file.max-file-size
properties.description: Maximum upload file size in bytes.
